Overview

The East Tower is a high-rise development in the New Administrative Capital, Egypt. I was responsible for the structural design of the reinforced concrete slab system, along with developing the structural BIM model and coordinating with architectural and MEP teams to ensure design accuracy, model consistency, and efficient multidisciplinary coordination throughout the project.
